description: Fresh install of proxvex with both SSL and OIDC addons. Verifies that (a) addon-ssl issued a fresh server certificate at /etc/ssl/addon/fullchain.pem with the container hostname in the SAN list and a future expiry, and (b) the OIDC endpoint returns 401 for unauthenticated API calls (i.e. OIDC is actually protecting the API).
